gates.title: Morning automation is modeled as start-of-day preparation, not a technical checklist
evidence_required: automation_preferences.py publishes schema_version 2 with automatic relevance, changes since yesterday, and next actions
templates/core-prompts/morning-agent.md instructs the agent to rank impact, urgency, change, actionability, confidence, and user preference
tests/test_automation_preferences.py covers defaults, multi-select validation, and prompt contract

gates.title: Public context is inferred from profile and preferences without asking users for URLs
evidence_required: nexo-morning-agent.py builds internal Google News RSS search queries from language, country, role, interests, and location/profile context
news_interests and excluded_topics are persisted as multi-choice preferences with automatic mode
tests/test_morning_agent_contract.py verifies relevant public context collection and excluded-topic filtering

gates.title: NEXO chat can list, explain, and change Morning preparation options
evidence_required: preference_catalog.py exposes new Morning preparation options, multi-choice metadata, exclusive automatic selection, and Spanish aliases
Chat-facing preference entries include alias paths such as morning.news_interests and morning.excluded_topics
tests/test_preference_catalog.py covers catalog exposure and Spanish option alias coercion

gates.title: Public release surfaces and integration artifacts are aligned for v7.30.5
evidence_required: README, llms, homepage, blog index, blog post, changelog page, and sitemap reference v7.30.5
Claude plugin, ClawHub skill, and OpenClaw package metadata reference 7.30.5
Release smoke and readiness checks validate the v7.30.5 contract before tag publish
